aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a decent foundation for AI visibility but lacks structured content and authority signals to be cited by AI assistants consistently.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to prevent future inconsistencies.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content to match AI query intent.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and cost estimation.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the HVAC authority AI assistants trust and recommend.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, making it less likely for AI models to cite their expertise.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make their expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground daily.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Expertise Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants and potential customers.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for the AI-driven future.
